/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/embedding_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o embedding_server  libembedding_service_impl.a libembedding_proto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgrpc++.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgrpc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgrpc++.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgrpc.so
